taco.name: Taco Salad
taco.description: Made fresh daily with romaine lettuce, shredded cheddar cheese, diced tomatoes, fire roasted corn, chile lime taco strips, our famous, hearty chili and creamy salsa dressing. A fresh take on tacos perfect for Tuesdays, Wednesdays, or any other days for that matter.

caesar.name: Parmesan Caesar Salad
caesar.description: Made fresh daily with romaine lettuce, shredded cheddar cheese, diced tomatoes, fire roasted corn, chile lime taco strips, our famous, hearty chili and creamy salsa dressing. A fresh take on tacos perfect for Tuesdays, Wednesdays, or any other days for that matter.

cobb.name: Cobb Salad
cobb.description: Made fresh daily with Wendy’s signature lettuce blend, grilled chicken, diced tomatoes, shredded cheddar cheese, chopped eggs, applewood smoked bacon, crispy fried onions, and ranch dressing. A hearty salad you can hardly wait for.

fries.name: French Fries
fries.description: Natural-cut, skin-on, sea-salted fries served hot and crispy. The world loves them for a reason.

baconator.name: Baconator Fries
baconator.description: Our natural-cut, skin-on, sea-salted fries topped with warm, creamy cheese sauce, shredded cheddar, and crispy Applewood smoked bacon.

vanilla.name: Vanilla Cold Brew with Cream
vanilla.description: Our smooth, rich cold brew, cream, and a silky vanilla syrup. Proof that vanilla doesn’t have to mean boring.

pineapple.name: Pineapple Citrus Sparkling Energy
pineapple.description: A sparkling pineapple citrus blend with a couple shots of caffeine over ice. You know how before you go on vacation you’re so excited you can’t sleep? That feeling tastes just like this drink.
